---
title: "analyse_policy"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-15"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(sf)
library(tmap)
```


```{r}
persons_base <-  read_delim("../public-svn/matsim/scenarios/countries/jp/gunma/gunma-v1.6/2026-03-18b-base-3000/gunma.output_persons.csv.gz") %>%  
  filter(!str_starts(person,"commuter")) %>%
  mutate(age_round = floor(age/10)*10) %>% 
  mutate(age_factor = factor(age_round, levels = seq(0,100,10), labels = c(paste0(seq(0,80,10),"-",seq(10,90,10)),"90+","90+")))

trips_base <- read_delim("../public-svn/matsim/scenarios/countries/jp/gunma/gunma-v1.6/2026-03-18b-base-3000/gunma.output_trips.csv.gz") %>%  
  filter(!str_starts(person,"commuter")) 



persons_policy <-  read_delim("../public-svn/matsim/scenarios/countries/jp/gunma/gunma-v1.6/2026-03-18b-policy-3000/gunma.output_persons.csv.gz")  %>%  
  filter(!str_starts(person,"commuter")) %>%
  mutate(age_round = floor(age/10)*10) %>% 
  mutate(age_factor = factor(age_round, levels = seq(0,100,10), labels = c(paste0(seq(0,80,10),"-",seq(10,90,10)),"90+","90+")))

trips_policy <- read_delim("../public-svn/matsim/scenarios/countries/jp/gunma/gunma-v1.6/2026-03-18b-policy-3000/gunma.output_trips.csv.gz") %>%  
  filter(!str_starts(person,"commuter")) 

# persons <- persons_raw %>%
#  
# 
# # trips_raw <- read_delim("/Users/jakob/git/public-svn/matsim/scenarios/countries/jp/gunma/gunma-v1.4/2026-03-10/002/002.output_trips.csv.gz")
# 
#  trips_raw <-  read_delim("/Users/jakob/git/public-svn/matsim/scenarios/countries/jp/gunma/gunma-v1.6/2026-03-12d-calibration-03_30/005/005.output_trips.csv.gz")
# 
# trips <- trips_raw %>% 
#   filter(!str_starts(person,"commuter")) 
```
carAvail
```{r}
persons_base %>% group_by(age_factor, carAvail) %>% count() %>% ungroup() %>% group_by(age_factor) %>%  mutate(share = n/sum(n)) %>% ggplot() + geom_col(aes(age_factor,share, fill = carAvail))

persons_policy %>% group_by(age_factor, carAvail) %>% count() %>% ungroup() %>% group_by(age_factor) %>%  mutate(share = n/sum(n)) %>% ggplot() + geom_col(aes(age_factor,share, fill = carAvail))

```
mode share
```{r}

# from process_travel_survery2
trips_processed %>% 
  mutate(age_round = floor(age/10)*10) %>% 
  mutate(age_factor = factor(age_round, levels = seq(0,100,10), labels = c(paste0(seq(0,80,10),"-",seq(10,90,10)),"90+","90+"))) %>% 
  select(age_factor, sex,mode, dist) %>%
  group_by(age_factor, mode,sex) %>% 
  summarise(n = n(), dist = sum(dist, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  group_by(age_factor,sex) %>%
  mutate(share_trips = n/sum(n), share_dist = dist/sum(dist)) %>% 
  mutate(Mode = factor(mode, levels = c("bike","walk","ride","car"))) %>% 
  mutate(sex = factor(sex, levels = c("Male","Female"),labels = c("Male","Female"))) %>% 
  ggplot() +
  geom_col(aes(age_factor,share_trips,fill = Mode)) +
  facet_grid(~sex) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))+
  labs(x = "Age Group", y = "Modal Split (Trip-Based)")


trips_base %>% 
  left_join(persons_base, by = "person") %>% 
  select(main_mode,age_factor,sex) %>% 
  mutate(car = main_mode == "car", walk = main_mode == "walk", ride = main_mode == "ride", bike = main_mode == "bike") %>%
  group_by(age_factor,sex) %>%
  summarise(car = sum(car)/n(), ride = sum(ride)/n(), walk = sum(walk)/n(), bike = sum(bike)/n()) %>% 
  pivot_longer(cols = -c(age_factor,sex), names_to = "mode", values_to = "share") %>% 
  mutate(sex = factor(sex, levels = c("m","f"),labels = c("Male","Female"))) %>% 
  mutate(Mode = factor(mode, levels = c("bike","walk","ride","car"))) %>% 
  ggplot() + 
  geom_col(aes(age_factor, share, fill = Mode)) + 
  facet_grid(~sex) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14)+
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))+
  labs(x = "Age Group", y = "Modal Split (Trip-Based)")

trips_policy %>% 
  left_join(persons_policy, by = "person") %>% 
  select(main_mode,age_factor,sex) %>% 
  mutate(car = main_mode == "car", walk = main_mode == "walk", ride = main_mode == "ride", bike = main_mode == "bike") %>%
  group_by(age_factor,sex) %>%
  summarise(car = sum(car)/n(), ride = sum(ride)/n(), walk = sum(walk)/n(), bike = sum(bike)/n()) %>% 
  pivot_longer(cols = -c(age_factor,sex), names_to = "mode", values_to = "share") %>% 
  mutate(sex = factor(sex, levels = c("m","f"),labels = c("Male","Female"))) %>% 
  mutate(Mode = factor(mode, levels = c("bike","walk","ride","car"))) %>% 
  ggplot() + 
  geom_col(aes(age_factor, share, fill = Mode)) + 
  facet_grid(~sex) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14)+
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))+
  labs(x = "Age Group", y = "Modal Split (Trip-Based)")
```

trip time
```{r}
trips_base %>% 
  left_join(persons_base, by = "person") %>% 
  select(trav_time,age_factor,sex) %>% 
  group_by(age_factor,sex) %>%
  summarise(trav_time = mean(trav_time)) %>% 
  mutate(sex = factor(sex, levels = c("m","f"),labels = c("Male","Female"))) %>%
  ggplot() + 
  geom_col(aes(age_factor, trav_time)) + 
  facet_grid(~sex) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14)+
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))+
  labs(title = "Base",x = "Age Group", y = "Travel Time Per Trip")


trips_policy %>% 
  left_join(persons_policy, by = "person") %>% 
  select(trav_time,age_factor,sex) %>% 
  group_by(age_factor,sex) %>%
  summarise(trav_time = mean(trav_time)) %>% 
  mutate(sex = factor(sex, levels = c("m","f"),labels = c("Male","Female"))) %>%
  ggplot() + 
  geom_col(aes(age_factor, trav_time)) + 
  facet_grid(~sex) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14)+
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))+
  labs(title = "Policy",x = "Age Group", y = "Travel Time Per Trip")

```


score
```{r}
score_base <- persons_base %>% group_by(sex,age_factor) %>% summarise(score = mean(executed_score)) 
# score_base

ggplot(score_base,aes(age_factor, score, fill = sex)) + geom_col(position = "dodge") + labs(title = "base")

score_policy <- persons_policy %>% group_by(sex,age_factor) %>% summarise(score = mean(executed_score))
# score_policy

ggplot(score_policy,aes(age_factor, score, fill = sex)) + geom_col(position = "dodge")+ labs(title = "policy")


left_join(score_base,score_policy, by = c("age_factor","sex")) %>% mutate(score_diff = score.y-score.x) %>% 
  ggplot() + geom_col(aes(age_factor,score_diff,fill = sex), position = "dodge")
```
